future_status_protocol: If SASSL publishes a live rainout notice or per-division field closure feed, enable polling only after parser tests. The facilities page is not itself a live rainout feed.
agent_rule: Official source wins. The facilities page confirms SASSL league play at Normoyle Park but does not provide a live rainout status, so keep official status unknown unless a clear official cancellation/closure source is found. Tell the user to check the official source before leaving.
